verse_text: I tell you, you shall not depart from there till you have paid the very last mite.'

links.context: Luke places this teaching in the context of the end of the age ([[LUK.12:57]]-59); here it is in the context of reconciliation surrounding the Liturgy. Delay in reconciliation allows for the spread of animosity and other evils ([[EPH.4:26]], [[EPH.4:27]]).

symbolic.title: Example: The Cherubim of Ezekiel I
